using InventoryFlow.Domain.Entities; using MediatR; namespace InventoryFlow.Application.Features.Warehouses;
public sealed record CreateWarehouseRequest(string Name); public sealed record WarehouseResponse(Guid Id,string Name,DateTimeOffset CreatedAtUtc) { public static WarehouseResponse From(Warehouse x)=>new(x.Id,x.Name,x.CreatedAtUtc); } public sealed record CreateWarehouseCommand(Guid WorkspaceId,string Name):IRequest<WarehouseResponse>; public sealed record ListWarehousesQuery(Guid WorkspaceId):IRequest<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseResponse>>; public sealed record ArchiveWarehouseCommand(Guid WorkspaceId,Guid WarehouseId):IRequest<bool>;

using InventoryFlow.Domain.Entities; using MediatR; namespace InventoryFlow.Application.Features.Warehouses;
public sealed record CreateWarehouseRequest(string Name); public sealed record WarehouseResponse(Guid Id,string Name,DateTimeOffset CreatedAtUtc) { public static WarehouseResponse From(Warehouse x)=>new(x.Id,x.Name,x.CreatedAtUtc); } public sealed record CreateWarehouseCommand(Guid WorkspaceId,string Name):IRequest<WarehouseResponse>; public sealed record ListWarehousesQuery(Guid WorkspaceId):IRequest<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseResponse>>; public sealed record ArchiveWarehouseCommand(Guid WorkspaceId,Guid WarehouseId):IRequest<bool>;

arguments.command:
cp backend/tests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests/Api/ProductEndpointsTests.cs /tmp/WarehouseEndpointsTests.cs
python3 - <<'PY'
p='/tmp/WarehouseEndpointsTests.cs'
s=open(p).read()
s=s.replace('InventoryFlow.Application.Features.Products','InventoryFlow.Application.Features.Warehouses')
s=s.replace('ProductEndpointsTests','WarehouseEndpointsTests').replace('product API','warehouse API').replace('Products','Warehouses').replace('products','warehouses').replace('Product','Warehouse').replace('product','warehouse')
s=s.replace('Sku', 'Name').replace('sku', 'name').replace('SKU', 'name')
s=s.replace('CreateWarehouseRequest("  Widget  ", " ab-1 ")','CreateWarehouseRequest("  Central Depot  ")')
s=s.replace('Assert.Equal("AB-1", warehouse!.Name);','Assert.Equal("Central Depot", warehouse!.Name);')
s=s.replace('new CreateWarehouseRequest("Another", "AB-1")','new CreateWarehouseRequest("Central Depot")')
s=s.replace('new CreateWarehouseRequest("First", "SHARED")','new CreateWarehouseRequest("Shared")').replace('new CreateWarehouseRequest("Second", "shared")','new CreateWarehouseRequest(" shared ")')
s=s.replace('new CreateWarehouseRequest("First", $"name-{suffix}")','new CreateWarehouseRequest($"Depot-{suffix}")').replace('new CreateWarehouseRequest("Second", $" NAME-{suffix.ToUpperInvariant()} ")','new CreateWarehouseRequest($" depot-{suffix.ToUpperInvariant()} ")')
open('backend/tests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests/Api/WarehouseEndpointsTests.cs','w').write(s)
PY
cp backend/tests/InventoryFlow.UnitTests/Domain/ProductTests.cs /tmp/WarehouseTests.cs
python3 - <<'PY'
p='/tmp/WarehouseTests.cs';s=open(p).read().replace('ProductTests','WarehouseTests').replace('Product','Warehouse').replace('product','warehouse').replace('Sku','Name').replace('sku','name').replace('SKU','name')
# likely constructors mismatch perhaps inspect after
open('backend/tests/InventoryFlow.UnitTests/Domain/WarehouseTests.cs','w').write(s)
PY
dotnet test backend/InventoryFlow.sln --no-restore
